title: Do you use the llama farm widget?🦙
excerpt:
We are looking at collection data around the Llama Farm widget and would love to hear if you use it in your workflow! 
Do you use the llama farm widget? 
poll

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
We are looking at collection data around the Llama Farm widget and would love to hear if you use it in your workflow!

Do you use the llama farm widget?

  • Yes!!
  • No
  • What is that?
0 voters

image830×398 56.9 KB

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: My team loves the llamas!

posts.author: Anky (Anky Van Wesenbeeck)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the concept of the farm but is not used here. We should maybe use it for our sales team to see how many are not sold yet.

posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml: I feel better that I’m not the only one who doesn’t know what this is, but I’m so happy to have discovered it.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: It is simply the best widget available

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: llama farm is fun concept but Monday team can better invest in implementing some basic features like text wrap, subitem date/timeline and duration rollups, dependencies between tasks and subtasks, and more… than the llama farm.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: or things like, I dunno, making the permission model actually enterprise grade?

posts.author: Quinn.N (Quinn Nora)
posts.cookedHtml: What is this? I can’t really tell just by looking at it. Could you stick an article here that explains it?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Quinn! Thanks for following up on this thread. The Llama Farm Widget is one of the many widgets that can be added to a dashboard. It gives teams a more interactive and quirky way to interpret the data on their boards.

You can read more about it here: The Llama Farm Widget.
